releases.author: vin-cf
releases.description:
Replaces builtin-modules with node:module builtins to address Obsidian Community scorecard warnings.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/vin-cf/obsidian-checkbox-auto-sort/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: vin-cf
releases.description:
Fix minor guideline violations

  1. interface ListItem declared inside update() — interfaces should be at module scope                                                                                                                                            
  2. async onload() with no await — async is unnecessary noise                                                                                                                                                                     
  3. Empty onunload() {} — cleanup is fully handled by MarkdownRenderChild.onunload() and registerEditorExtension; the empty override implies there's something to clean up when there isn't   

Co-authored with Claude Code - using gstack

releases.author: vin-cf
releases.description:
**What it does**

Checked checkboxes sort to the bottom of their list block the moment you tick them — in both editor (live preview) and reading mode. Uncheck an item and it moves back to the top. No configuration required.

**Reading mode support**
Previous versions only worked in the editor. Reading mode is now fully supported. Because Obsidian toggles the is-checked class directly on list items after a checkbox click (rather than re-rendering the section), a MutationObserver watches for those class changes and re-sorts immediately.

**Other changes**
  - There is no data.json, no settings tab, and no commands.
  - Sort is skipped entirely when a list has no checked items or no unchecked items, so the observer does no unnecessary work on notes that don't need sorting.
  - Divider line removed — it persisted incorrectly after unchecking the last item and added fragile state management with no clear benefit.

Co-authored with Claude Code using gstack
releases.name: Initial release
